summary: 124 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: All config models defined as Pydantic BaseModel subclasses
completion_promises.evidence: GenerationConfig, ChunkingConfig, LoggingConfig, and AgentConfig are all defined as Pydantic BaseModel subclasses in config/models.py. Tests TestGenerationConfigValidation::test_is_pydantic_base_model, TestChunkingConfigValidation::test_is_pydantic_base_model, TestLoggingConfigValidation::test_is_pydantic_base_model, and TestAgentConfigStructure::test_is_pydantic_base_model verify this with issubclass(cls, BaseModel) assertions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All validation rules from DM-agent-config.md enforced via Pydantic validators
completion_promises.evidence: All validation rules implemented: max_turns >= 1 (Field ge=1 + field_validator), chunk_size > 0 (Field gt=0), overlap >= 0 and < chunk_size (Field ge=0 + model_validator), level must be DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR (field_validator), format must be 'json' (field_validator per ADR-ARCH-007). Tests cover all boundary and negative scenarios: TestGenerationConfigValidation (max_turns=0 rejected, max_turns=1 accepted), TestChunkingConfigValidation (chunk_size=0 rejected, overlap=512 with chunk_size=512 rejected, overlap=511 with chunk_size=512 accepted), TestLoggingConfigValidation (VERBOSE/TRACE/CRITICAL/info/debug rejected, text/plain format rejected).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Default values match the API contract (API-entrypoint.md)
completion_promises.evidence: All defaults verified against API-entrypoint.md: max_turns=3, llm_retry_attempts=3, llm_retry_backoff=2.0, llm_timeout=300, target_timeout=600, chunk_size=512, overlap=64, level='INFO', format='json'. Tests TestGenerationConfigDefaults, TestChunkingConfigDefaults, TestLoggingConfigDefaults, and TestAgentConfigStructure::test_minimal_config_with_defaults all verify these defaults.

completion_promises.criterion_text: ConfigDict(extra='ignore') set for unknown field tolerance
completion_promises.evidence: model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') is set on GenerationConfig, ChunkingConfig, LoggingConfig, and AgentConfig. Tests TestGenerationConfigValidation::test_extra_fields_ignored, TestChunkingConfigValidation::test_extra_fields_ignored, TestLoggingConfigValidation::test_extra_fields_ignored, and TestAgentConfigExtraFields::test_extra_fields_ignored verify unknown fields are silently dropped. AgentConfig.__init__ also logs a warning for unknown fields (tested by TestAgentConfigExtraFields::test_unknown_fields_warning_logged).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all boundary and negative validation scenarios
completion_promises.evidence: 124 tests total covering: defaults for all fields, boundary values (max_turns=1, chunk_size=1, overlap=0, overlap=chunk_size-1), negative cases (max_turns=0, max_turns=-1, chunk_size=0, chunk_size=-1, overlap=-1, overlap>=chunk_size, invalid log levels VERBOSE/TRACE/CRITICAL/info/debug, non-json formats), nested validation propagation through AgentConfig, extra field handling with warning logging. Coverage: 99% on config/models.py.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both config/models.py and config/tests/test_models.py pass py_compile with zero errors. Code follows PEP 8, uses type hints throughout, proper docstrings, from __future__ import annotations. No warnings in test run (deprecation warning was fixed by accessing model_fields from class instead of instance).
